saved_test.name: Verb to Be: Past Forms — Opus 4.6 V3 Questions Test
saved_test.description: Practice set for verb to be past forms: was and were in statements, negatives, yes/no questions, wh-questions, short answers, there was/were, contractions, passive, past continuous, tag questions, conditionals across A1–C2.
